Title: The durably resistant rice cultivar Digu activates defence gene expression before the full maturation of Magnaporthe oryzae appressorium

Common_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Leucine-rich repeat receptor kinase (LRR-RK), LRR VIII-2 subfamily, membrane-associated receptor kinase
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Specifically up-regulated in Digu at 5, 10 and 20 hpi after Magnaporthe oryzae inoculation
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Overexpressed in TP309 seedlings; native transcript induced in resistant rice upon infection
Common_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Ubi promoter (constitutive) in overexpression construct Ubi-C1300-Os08g10300
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Enhanced resistance to Magnaporthe oryzae when overexpressed in rice; associated with increased PR gene expression
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. LOC_Os08g10300 was one of two receptor kinase genes specifically up-regulated in Digu at all three early infection time points. 2. It encodes an LRR VIII-2 receptor kinase and was selected from Digu-specific induced RK genes for functional analysis. 3. Overexpression in susceptible TP309 enhanced resistance to five M. oryzae strains and co-segregated with reduced lesion formation. 4. PR gene expression was elevated in transgenic plants, supporting a positive role in early defence activation.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Magnaporthe oryzae infection; sampled at 5, 10 and 20 hpi; disease assays with strains WJ9, WJ10, YC7, YC26 and Zhong-10-8-14
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Microarray differential expression analysis; qRT-PCR validation; Agrobacterium-mediated constitutive overexpression in TP309; blast inoculation assays across multiple fungal strains; cosegregation analysis in T1/T2 progeny; lesion phenotyping; PR gene qRT-PCR
Common_Genes.Omics_Data: Microarray transcriptomics using Affymetrix GeneChip Rice Genome Array; accession not reported
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Although the paper discusses antioxidant, terpene and hormone biosynthesis pathway activation, LOC_Os08g10300 itself is a defence receptor kinase rather than a nutrient-metabolism gene. It was the only core gene functionally validated in planta in the Results section.
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Promising candidate for engineering broad-spectrum or durable blast resistance in rice via transgenic overexpression or allele mining/editing, but direct nutrient-metabolism utility is not established.
